title: Spatial Transcriptomics Spatial Domain Identification
summary: Cluster 12 human DLPFC 10x Visium slices into spatial domains and submit per-spot labels, summary metrics, manifest metadata, and one UMAP overlay.
taskPrompt:
You are given 12 human DLPFC 10x Visium slices and must identify spatial domains on every slice.

Task directory:
- `base`

Visible inputs:
- Slice data directories: `base/input/data/<slice_id>/`
- Per-slice target cluster counts: `base/input/data/slice_config.csv`
- Optional Python runtime manifest: `base/input/runtime_env/pyproject.toml`
- Optional Python lockfile: `base/input/runtime_env/uv.lock`
- Baseline uv wrapper: `base/software/uv`
- Baseline Python 3.12 wrapper: `base/software/python3.12`
- Detailed task prompt: `base/input/task_prompt.md`

If you need the staged spatial transcriptomics stack, run `base/software/uv sync --frozen --python 3.12 --project base/input/runtime_env`.

Required outputs under `base/output`:
- `summary.csv` with header `slice_id,n_spots_scored,n_clusters_pred,ari,nmi`
- `manifest.json` with method metadata, an integer seed, and graph/embedding/clustering flags
- `per_slice/<slice_id>_labels.csv` for all 12 slices with header `barcode,predicted_label`
- `umap_overlay_151673.png`

Use the exact per-slice target cluster counts from `slice_config.csv`, treat `input/` as read-only, and keep solver-created files under `output/`.
agentMustDo: Load the staged matrix, features, barcodes, and spatial-coordinate files for all 12 Visium slices.
Use `input/data/slice_config.csv` as the exact target number of clusters per slice.
Run an unsupervised spatial-domain identification workflow.
Write one `per_slice/<slice_id>_labels.csv` file per slice with `barcode,predicted_label` columns.
Write `summary.csv`, `manifest.json`, and `umap_overlay_151673.png` under the runtime output directory.

inputFiles.name: matrix.mtx / features.tsv / barcodes.tsv
inputFiles.description: Per-slice Visium count matrices and feature/barcode tables.

inputFiles.name: spatial
inputFiles.description: Per-slice tissue positions and scale factors.

inputFiles.name: slice_config.csv
inputFiles.description: Per-slice subject IDs and required cluster counts.

inputFiles.name: runtime_env
inputFiles.description: Optional pinned Python runtime for Scanpy/Squidpy-style analysis.

inputFiles.name: software wrappers
inputFiles.description: Task-local wrappers for the VM baseline uv and Python 3.12 tools.

referenceFiles.name: manifest.json
referenceFiles.description: Required method metadata and graph/embedding/clustering flags.

referenceFiles.name: <slice_id>_labels.csv
referenceFiles.description: Required per-barcode predicted spatial-domain labels for each slice.

evaluation: The evaluator hard-fails missing or malformed required outputs, wrong per-slice cluster counts, bad manifest fields, invalid/small PNG output, insufficient scored-barcode coverage, or summary metrics that disagree with recomputation. Passing outputs are scored from median ARI across the 12 slices, with the submitted positive fixture calibrated to score 1.0 and the deterministic round-robin negative fixture scoring 0.0.

classifier.rationale: The task involves identifying spatial domains in transcriptomic data, which relates to cell and imaging biology.
